task.title: Remove footer GitHub and Twitter text links

events.content: Removed the footer GitHub and Twitter text links and kept the icon links only: Removed the footer GitHub and Twitter text links and kept the icon links only

raw.question: Removed the footer GitHub and Twitter text links and kept the icon links only
raw.chosen: Removed the footer GitHub and Twitter text links and kept the icon links only
raw.reasoning: The user wanted those destinations represented by the social icons only, not duplicated as text links in the footer columns.

events.content: Footer text-link removal is done. Build failed once during Next trace collection because a generated .nft manifest was missing; rerunning to distinguish a flaky artifact issue from a real regression.

retrospective.summary: Removed the footer GitHub and Twitter text links, leaving only the social icons in the footer bottom row.
